title: Flodesk vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Flodesk and Sendinblue. Learn which email marketing tool suits your needs with pricing, features, and ratings.
intro: Flodesk and Sendinblue (now Brevo) serve different email marketing needs. Flodesk excels at beautiful email design for creative brands, while Sendinblue offers a comprehensive CRM suite with transactional capabilities and SMS. Understanding their strengths will help you pick the right platform for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, workflows, forms, link in bio
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, chat, transactional API

choose_a_if: You prioritize beautiful email design and templates
You want unlimited subscribers at a flat monthly price
You run a visual brand (photography, design, fashion)
choose_b_if: You need a free tier with generous limits
You want SMS, WhatsApp, and CRM features included
You need multi-channel communication in one platform

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Flodesk excels for design-focused brands with beautiful templates and unlimited subscribers. Sendinblue offers more features, better pricing for startups, and multi-channel capabilities. Choose based on your priority: aesthetics vs. functionality and affordability.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper. It offers a free tier with 100,000 subscribers and 300 emails daily at no cost, while paid plans start at $25/month. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month. For budget-conscious businesses, Sendinblue wins on price.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and imports. However, note that Flodesk focuses on visual email design, so your workflow and template strategy may need adjustment. Migration is straightforward, but the user experience and feature set differ significantly between the two.
